name: Moist & Rich Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oil, buttermilk, yolks, and vanilla extract.
2. Gradually add sugar, cocoa powder, salt, and flour to the mixture.
3. Stir in soda water and boiling water until smooth.
4. Pour batter into a greased 9x12 inch pan.
5. Bake for one hour at 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. This is a "finger cake" - no icing needed. Perfect for lunchboxes.
